domain.description: Pipedrive domain. This is found in Pipedrive in Settings > Company settings > Company domain.
domain.label: Domain

apiToken.description: Pipedrive API token. This is found in Pipedrive in Settings > Personal preferences > API > Your personal API token.
apiToken.label: API Token

personField.description: This is a key by which a Person in Pipedrive will be searched. It can be either Person id or has of a custom field containing external id. Default value is `person_id`.
personField.label: External ID field for a Person in Pipedrive

organizationField.description: This is a key by which an Organization in Pipedrive will be searched. It can be either Organization id or has of a custom field containing external id. Default value is `org_id`.
organizationField.label: External ID field for an Organization in Pipedrive

dealField.description: This is a key by which a Deal in Pipedrive will be searched. It can be either Deal id or has of a custom field containing external id. Default value is `deal_id`.
dealField.label: External ID field for a Deal in Pipedrive

actions.name: Create or Update Organization
actions.description: Update an organization in Pipedrive or create it if it doesn't exist yet.

fields.label: Match field
fields.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

match_field.title: Match field
match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

fields.label: Match value
fields.description: Value to find existing organization by

match_value.title: Match value
match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by

fields.label: Organization Name
fields.description: Name of the organization

fields.label: Visible To
fields.description: Visibility of the Organization. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

visible_to.title: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the Organization. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

fields.label: Created At
fields.description: If the organization is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

add_time.title: Created At
add_time.description: If the organization is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

fields.label: Custom fields
fields.description: New values for custom fields.

fields.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

fields.label: Person Name

fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: Email addresses for this person.

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.description: Phone numbers for the person.

fields.label: Visible To
fields.description: Visibility of the Person. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

visible_to.title: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the Person. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

fields.label: Created At
fields.description: If the person is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

add_time.title: Created At
add_time.description: If the person is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

fields.label: Custom fields

actions.name: Create or update Lead
actions.description: Update a Lead in Pipedrive or create it if it doesn't exist yet.

fields.label: Lead ID
fields.description: ID of Lead in Pipedrive to Update. If left empty, a new one will be created

lead_id.title: Lead ID
lead_id.description: ID of Lead in Pipedrive to Update. If left empty, a new one will be created

fields.label: Person match field
fields.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

person_match_field.title: Person match field
person_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

fields.label: Person match value
fields.description: Value to find existing person by. Required unless organization_match_value present

person_match_value.title: Person match value
person_match_value.description: Value to find existing person by. Required unless organization_match_value present

fields.label: Organization match field
fields.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

organization_match_field.title: Organization match field
organization_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

fields.label: Organization match value
fields.description: Value to find existing organization by. Required unless person_match_value present

organization_match_value.title: Organization match value
organization_match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by. Required unless person_match_value present

fields.label: Title
fields.description: The name of the Lead

fields.label: Amount
fields.description: Potential value of the lead

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Three-letter code of the currency, e.g. USD

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Three-letter code of the currency, e.g. USD

fields.label: Expected Close Date
fields.description: The date of when the Deal which will be created from the Lead is expected to be closed. In ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.

expected_close_date.title: Expected Close Date
expected_close_date.description: The date of when the Deal which will be created from the Lead is expected to be closed. In ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.label: Visible To
fields.description: Visibility of the Lead. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

visible_to.title: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the Lead. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

actions.name: Create or update a Deal
actions.description: Update a Deal in Pipedrive or create it if it doesn't exist yet.

fields.label: Deal match field
fields.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing deal in Pipedrive.

deal_match_field.title: Deal match field
deal_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing deal in Pipedrive.

fields.label: Deal match value
fields.description: Value to find existing deal by

deal_match_value.title: Deal match value
deal_match_value.description: Value to find existing deal by

fields.label: Person match field
fields.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

person_match_field.title: Person match field
person_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing person in Pipedrive.

fields.label: Person match value
fields.description: Value to find existing person by. Required unless organization_match_value present

person_match_value.title: Person match value
person_match_value.description: Value to find existing person by. Required unless organization_match_value present

fields.label: Organization match field
fields.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

organization_match_field.title: Organization match field
organization_match_field.description: If present, used instead of field in settings to find existing organization in Pipedrive.

fields.label: Organization match value
fields.description: Value to find existing organization by. Required unless person_match_value present

organization_match_value.title: Organization match value
organization_match_value.description: Value to find existing organization by. Required unless person_match_value present

fields.label: Title
fields.description: Deal title  (required for new Leads)

fields.label: Value
fields.description: Value of the deal. If omitted, value will be set to 0.

value.title: Value
value.description: Value of the deal. If omitted, value will be set to 0.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency of the deal. Accepts a 3-character currency code. If omitted, currency will be set to the default currency of the authorized user.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the deal. Accepts a 3-character currency code. If omitted, currency will be set to the default currency of the authorized user.

fields.label: Stage ID
fields.description: The ID of a stage this Deal will be placed in a pipeline (note that you can't supply the ID of the pipeline as this will be assigned automatically based on stage_id). If omitted, the deal will be placed in the first stage of the default pipeline.

stage_id.title: Stage ID
stage_id.description: The ID of a stage this Deal will be placed in a pipeline (note that you can't supply the ID of the pipeline as this will be assigned automatically based on stage_id). If omitted, the deal will be placed in the first stage of the default pipeline.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Deal status - open, won, lost or deleted. If omitted, status will be set to open.

status.title: Status
status.description: Deal status - open, won, lost or deleted. If omitted, status will be set to open.

fields.label: Expected Close Date
fields.description: The expected close date of the Deal. In ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.

expected_close_date.title: Expected Close Date
expected_close_date.description: The expected close date of the Deal. In ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.label: Success Probability
fields.description: Deal success probability percentage. Used/shown only when deal_probability for the pipeline of the deal is enabled.

probability.title: Success Probability
probability.description: Deal success probability percentage. Used/shown only when deal_probability for the pipeline of the deal is enabled.

fields.label: Lost Reason
fields.description: Optional message about why the deal was lost (to be used when status=lost)

lost_reason.title: Lost Reason
lost_reason.description: Optional message about why the deal was lost (to be used when status=lost)

fields.label: Visible To
fields.description: Visibility of the deal. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

visible_to.title: Visible To
visible_to.description: Visibility of the deal. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. 'Owner's visibility group and sub-groups' and 'Entire company' options only available with Professional or Enterprise plans

fields.label: Created At
fields.description: If the deal is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

add_time.title: Created At
add_time.description: If the deal is created, use this timestamp as the creation timestamp. Format: YYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

fields.label: Custom fields
fields.description: New values for custom fields.

fields.description: Subject of the Activity. When value for subject is not set, it will be given a default value `Call`.

fields.description: Type of the Activity. This is in correlation with the key_string parameter of ActivityTypes. When value for type is not set, it will be given a default value `Call`

type.description: Type of the Activity. This is in correlation with the key_string parameter of ActivityTypes. When value for type is not set, it will be given a default value `Call`

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Additional details about the Activity that is synced to your external calendar. Unlike the note added to the Activity, the description is publicly visible to any guests added to the Activity.

description.description: Additional details about the Activity that is synced to your external calendar. Unlike the note added to the Activity, the description is publicly visible to any guests added to the Activity.
